criteria.name: User Friendliness
criteria.description: The app should have a clean and easy-to-navigate interface, making it accessible for both novice and experienced users.

criteria.name: Production Quality
criteria.description: The quality of the music generated by the AI should be professional-grade, suitable for commercial use.

criteria.name: Customization Options
criteria.description: The app should offer a range of editing features and customization options to allow users to tailor the generated music to their specific needs.

criteria.name: Licensing Terms
criteria.description: The app should offer clear and favorable licensing terms for the generated music, allowing users to use it for various purposes without copyright issues.

criteria.name: Range of Genres and Styles
criteria.description: The app should support a wide variety of music genres and styles, catering to different creative preferences.

criteria.name: Vocal Realism
criteria.description: The AI-generated vocals should sound natural and human-like.

criteria.name: Price
criteria.description: The app should be affordable and offer a good value for its features, with flexible subscription plans or a generous free tier.
criteria.sources: SOUNDRAW Blog, OpenHome, AudioCipher, Kripesh Adwani
